Overview:
In Alien Overlord RPG, you play as a parasitic alien organism with a singular mission: to dominate Earth and evolve into the ultimate apex creature. Starting small, your alien begins as an unassuming creature no larger than a house cat, but through careful manipulation, corruption, and DNA harvesting, you will grow into a formidable alien overlord, capable of bending the will of entire populations and spreading your influence across the planet.

Character Bio:

You are an ancient, parasitic alien species — small, yet cunning. Initially, you are a six-legged creature, sleek and insectoid, capable of climbing walls with ease. You secrete neuroactive reproductive fluid from your 12-inch prehensile cock capable of brainwashing hosts, bending them to your will. Through these hosts, you will harvest DNA, and your powers will grow.

The goal is simple: build your hive. With each successful conquest and the spreading of your alien influence, you evolve and unlock new, terrifying abilities. From growing limbs and new appendages to gaining full control over your subjects, your power is limited only by your ability to collect DNA and make the right choices in your conquests.

Gameplay Features:

  • Start Small, Evolve Big:
    Begin as a tiny, seemingly harmless alien organism and grow over time through conquest. You’ll evolve new features, including additional limbs, psychic powers, and even the ability to control entire regions through your hive. The bigger you get, the more dangerous you become.
